title: CreateTaskRequest
description: Request body for creating a new task.

description.description: The task description in rich text format.

markdown_description.description: The task description in Markdown format.

assignees.description: Array of user IDs to assign to the task.

tags.description: Array of tag names to apply to the task.

priority.description: Task priority. 1 is Urgent, 2 is High, 3 is Normal, 4 is Low.

due_date.description: Due date as Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

due_date_time.description: Whether the due date includes a time component.

start_date.description: Start date as Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

start_date_time.description: Whether the start date includes a time component.

notify_all.description: Notify all assignees and watchers of task creation.

parent.description: The task ID of the parent task to create this as a subtask.

links_to.description: The task ID to link this task to.

check_required_custom_fields.description: Whether to validate required custom fields.

value.description: The value to set for the custom field.

custom_fields.description: Custom field values to set on the task.
